settings.title: Sustainable Swimwear Fabric: ECONYL® Regenerated Nylon
settings.text:
Sustainable. Sculpting. Sun-Protective.

Swimwear that stays on, sculpts your shape, and moves with you - in and out of the water.

Crafted from premium Italian ECONYL®, this is a fabric designed to perform, feel incredible on the skin, and last season after season.

But sustainability is only part of the story.

settings.heading: Why We Choose ECONYL® (Even Though It Costs More)
settings.subheading_text:
Not all swimwear fabrics are created equal.

ECONYL® is made through an advanced regeneration process that transforms waste back into premium nylon. It’s far more complex than producing standard fabrics - which is why it comes at a higher cost.

But what that means for you is simple:

- A more sculpting, supportive fit that holds you in all the right places.

- Fabric that lasts - no sagging, thinning, or losing shape after a few wears.

- Reliable built-in UPF 50+ sun protection.

- A lower impact on the ocean you love spending time in.

We chose this fabric intentionally - because it performs better, feels better on your skin, and lasts season after season.

settings.title: Designed to Sculpt, Support, and Move With You
settings.text:
Crafted from premium Italian ECONYL®, sourced from world-renowned fabric mills, this material combines a luxurious, second-skin feel with the strength to support real movement in the water.

It feels soft against the skin, holds its shape over time, and delivers a flattering, sculpted fit - whether you're surfing, swimming, or spending long days in the sun.

settings.title: UPF 50+ Sun Protection - Built Into the Fabric
settings.text:
Unlike sunscreen, which needs constant reapplication, ECONYL® fabric provides consistent, built-in sun protection every time you wear it.

All Ocean Soul Swimwear is made with ECONYL®. Which is engineered with a dense, high-quality structure and tested to provide UPF 50+ protection - blocking 98% of harmful UV rays.

While sunscreen plays an important role, some formulas can wash off in the water during swimming and surf - and can impact the ocean environment over time.

Built-in protection gives you reliable coverage in motion, without needing to constantly reapply on covered areas.

Why this matters:

Protection stays consistent in and out of the water
No need to reapply on covered areas
Ideal for long surf sessions and ocean swims
Helps reduce sun damage and skin exposure

The combination of long sleeve coverage, premium fabric density, and darker colourways enhances protection for extended time in the sun.

This is what makes them true sun-protection swimwear - not just swimwear.

settings.title: Made From Ocean Waste
settings.text:
ECONYL® is created by regenerating nylon waste that would otherwise pollute our oceans and landfill.

This includes:
Discarded fishing nets
Fabric scraps
Industrial plastic

These materials are transformed into a high-quality yarn that performs like new - without the environmental impact.
Waste is collected from oceans and landfill around the world, including fishing nets, fabric scraps, carpet flooring, and industrial plastic.

Collected plastic waste Is sorted, cleaned, and purified to Its original state in a proprietary process. A blind eye would never know the difference between fossil-made nylon and regenerated nylon fabric.
The Recycled Nylon Is Processed Into Yarns and Polymers. This is the part of the process where we get to source the lovingly-made sustainable fabric to create your swimsuit!

settings.title: Built for Performance - Not Just Sustainability
settings.text:
Sustainability only matters if your swimwear lasts.

ECONYL® fabric is engineered to:

Resist chlorine and saltwater
Maintain shape and compression
Retain colour over time

This allows our swimsuits to last up to twice as long as regular swimwear.

Less replacing. Less waste. Better value.

settings.liquid:
Why You’ll Feel the Difference

Not all swimwear performs the same - and you’ll notice it from the moment you put it on.

Feature Ocean Soul Swimwear (ECONYL®) Standard Swimwear
Sun Protection UPF 50+ protection built into the fabric Often low or untested protection
Fit & Feel Sculpting, supportive, and secure Can feel thin or less supportive
In the Water Stays in place when you move Can shift or need adjusting
Shape Over Time Holds structure and compression Stretches and loses shape
Durability Designed to last up to 2x longer Wears out quickly
Chlorine & Saltwater Resists damage and fading Breaks down with exposure
Sustainability Regenerated from ocean and landfill waste Made from virgin synthetic materials

The difference isn’t just in how it’s made - it’s in how it feels, fits, and lasts.

Why ECONYL® Outperforms Regular Swimwear Fabric

Not all swimwear performs the same - and you'll notice from the moment you put it on.

Feature ECONYL® Fabric (Ocean Soul) Standard Swimwear Fabric
Sun Protection UPF 50+ built into the fabric Often low or untested UV protection
Durability Designed to last up to 2x longer Breaks down quickly with wear
Shape Retention Holds compression and structure over time Stretches out and loses support
Chlorine Resistance Resists chlorine and saltwater damage Fades and weakens with exposure
Sustainability Made from regenerated ocean and landfill waste Made from virgin synthetic materials
Feel on Skin Soft, smooth, breathable and supportive Can feel thin or less supportive
Performance Fit Sculpting, supportive and stays in place Often shifts or loses fit in the water

The difference isn’t just sustainability - it’s how the swimsuit performs, fits, and lasts over time.

settings.title: Why ECONYL® Is the Future of Sustainable Swimwear
settings.text:
We chose ECONYL® because it it allows us to create swimwear that doesn’t compromise - on performance, feel, or longevity.

Regenerated from waste and crafted into premium Italian fabric, it delivers the strength, structure, and softness needed for swimwear that’s made to be worn, not replaced.

It’s a conscious choice - for the ocean, and for the women who live in it.

Recycled Nylon Fabric is the perfect material for a Sustainable Swimsuit:

→ Snug and comfy compression for a slimming swimsuit

→ Quick-drying fabric for all your adventures

→ Perfectly sturdy and durable material for water activities that can get rough

→ Natural UPF properties provide swimwear with sun protection plus chlorine resistance Sustainable Fabric = Minimal Environmental Impact

settings.heading: The REsults
settings.text:
Lower Impact. Higher Performance.

ECONYL® significantly reduces environmental impact without compromising on quality.

Every 10,000 tons of Econyl recycled nylon saves approximately:
~ 70,000 barrels worth of crude oil
~ 65,100 tonnes of carbon emissions

Compared to conventional nylon, it can reduce global warming impact by up to 90%.

Less waste. Less impact. Same premium performance.

settings.title: Soft, Sculpting, and Designed to Move With You
settings.text:
Despite its strength, ECONYL® feels:

Smooth against the skin Breathable in warm conditions Supportive without restriction

Combined with our panelled design, it creates a sculpting, second-skin fit that you'll reach for again and again.

settings.title: A Better Fabric - In Every Sense
settings.text:
Sustainable. Functional. Made to Last.

Designed to move with you.

Created to flatter your shape.

Made with intention - and built to last.

Swimwear that supports your movement, stays in place, and feels as good as it looks.

So you can focus on the moment, not what you’re wearing.

Buy Less. Choose Better. Wear It Longer.

settings.title: Anytime we can take care of Mother Nature, we’re all in.
Long Sleeve Swimwear, Surf & Ocean Living
